shuffle_options.D: Sulfamethoxazole, 800 mg, and trimethoprim, 160 mg, by mouth twice daily for 14 days

shuffle_options.A: Observe and follow up in 3 months
Send for infectious and inflammatory laboratory workup and start oral prednisone
shuffle_options.B: Perform bilateral pars plana vitrectomy with or without scleral buckle for retinal detachment repair
shuffle_options.C: Check blood pressure and obtain complete blood cell count and metabolic panel

shuffle_options.D: Refer to rheumatology for additional autoimmune workup
